ZS SoW Dupixent PSS 2026 Q1 Enhancements.text:
INDIVIDUAL PROJECT AGREEMENT (“IPA”) 
under 
Master Services Agreement 
Dated February 22, 2021, as amended 
 
 
Customer: Genzyme Corporation 
 
Title of Project: Dupixent PSS Dashboard Enhancements and Build Q1 2026 
 
Customer Project Contact: Sandhya Sayani, Senior Director 
 
Vendor Project Contact: Prasoon Kumar, Principal 
 
For Primary Market Research projects: Customer’s iTracker Project Number: 
______________ 
 
The following terms and conditions apply solely to work performed under this IPA and do 
not apply to any other IPA. The IPA is governed by the terms of the Master Service 
Agreement dated February 22, 2021, as amended between Sanofi US Services Inc. and ZS 
Associates, Inc. (“MSA”). To the extent there is any conflict between the terms and 
conditions of this IPA and the MSA, the MSA controls. All capitalized terms in this IPA will 
have the same defined meanings as set forth in the MSA. This IPA shall be effective upon 
acceptance of the purchase order. 
 
1. Project Summary: 
 
This project involves collaboration with Sanofi’s PSS Analytics and Reporting team to 
enhance existing dashboards and develop new dashboards, including end-to-end 
support for User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and launch. The scope includes 
development and launch of the Dupixent PSS Performance Dashboard, enhancements 
to the Dupixent Patient Onboarding Dashboard and Dupixent PSS Executive 
Dashboard, and enhancement and launch support for the Dupixent PSS On-Therapy 
Dashboard. Based on the requirements, the project is targeted commence on 
1/19/2026 and end on 5/22/2026 
 
Services under this IPA 
 
☐ Do not require Third Party Vendors 
☐ Do require Third Party Vendors 
 
_If required please list: ____________________________________________

2.2 Out of Scope 
 
• Any changes to the project scope should be communicated in advance and discussed 
with the ZS team. If needed, such changes may be formalized through a separate 
Change Order. 
• Infrastructure maintenance, including recovery and backup, security maintenance will be 
managed by Sanofi team and is considered out of scope for ZS

ZS SoW Dupixent PSS 2026 Q1 Enhancements.text:
• Operations support is out of scope for this SOW 
• Creating training videos, infographic content 
 
2.3 Assumptions 
 
• For the engagement, the ZS team will be utilizing the PV file, dispense file, PSS View file 
and other required datasets to develop data views and reports 
• The data provided by upstream will be quality checked by the upstream teams and will 
ensure the quality of the same 
• Delays arising from data availability or other dependencies may affect the timelines of 
individual deliverables, potentially impacting the overall project schedule and the 
associated professional fees. 
• The Sanofi PSS A&R team will be responsible for finalizing business rules 
• Sanofi will ensure the availability of relevant stakeholders to share business 
requirements, rules, and other project-related guidance. 
• The project timeline assumes that all dependencies and prerequisites are met as 
scheduled 
• The entire ZS team (except the UI/UX SME) will be based out of ZS India offices 
• India ZS team will overlap with the Sanofi stakeholders during US ET AM hours 
• ZS resources will be onboarded to the Sanofi network prior to the initiation of the project. 
Any delay may impact on the project’s start 
• ZS will get the required support from Sanofi to address and open queries and respond to 
information required by ZS teams 
• Any reduction in hours owing to Offshore holidays will not be carried forward to the 
following weeks and will account for reduction in the week of occurrence 
• Current scope and budget estimations include activities defined under the section 2.1

ZS SoW Dupixent PSS 2026 Q1 Enhancements.source_file: ZS SoW Dupixent PSS 2026 Q1 Enhancements and Build Support v3 1.13.2026.pdf

ZS SoW Dupixent PSS 2026 Q1 Enhancements.text:
2.4 Timelines 
• The work is proposed to commence on 1/19/2026 and end on 5/22/2026. The 
proposed plan is as below: 
 
 
 
• The enhancements will be bundled in 4-week releases, ensuring incremental 
transition to HUB 
• For PSS Performance Dashboard, the launch cycle will be longer (8 weeks 
including requirements finalization, data and dashboard build, testing, Launch 
and Hypercare) followed by 4-week release cycles for enhancements 
• The requirements for the next release cycle are to be finalized a week before the 
commencement of upcoming release cycle to ensure smooth releases. 
• Development, Testing and Hypercare phases for all dashboards will end on 1st 
May. Subsequent weeks will be dedicated for shadow support to HUB team for 
smooth transition. ZS team will operate in a limited capacity to provide shadow 
support 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
3. Budget: 
 
Pricing Model 
☐ Time & Materials

Pass-through costs properly incurred by the Vendor in supplying the Services shall be invoiced 
at cost. 
 
The total maximum amount payable under this IPA shall not exceed $385,312. The Vendor’s work 
is at the direction of the Customer and Customer is not responsible for any work by the Vendor 
that is not inherent to the Services and Customer did not authorize or approve in advance. Any 
fees or expenses beyond the budget will have to be approved by Customer. Vendor will not begin 
incurring any additional costs or hours until Customer confirms in writing that it agrees to the 
additional costs.
